name: clinical-research-assistant
description: Clinical research tools for general surgery residents — literature review, statistical analysis, visualization, and manuscript writing

plugins.name: clinical-research-assistant
plugins.description: Interactive clinical research assistant with 7 commands: /write-manuscript (full pipeline orchestrator with state tracking), /literature-review (deep PubMed/bioRxiv search + gap analysis), /analyze (statistics + Excel tables), /visualize (publication-quality figures), /write-introduction (Introduction in chat), /write-methods-results (Methods & Results in chat), /write-discussion (Discussion & Conclusion in chat)
